buildCommand: mkdir -p public/sessions public/static && ([ "$(realpath ../../sessions 2>/dev/null)" = "$(realpath public/sessions 2>/dev/null)" ] || cp -r ../../sessions/. public/sessions/) && ([ "$(realpath ../../static 2>/dev/null)" = "$(realpath public/static 2>/dev/null)" ] || cp -r ../../static/. public/static/) && next build
